query: My GitHub Actions deploy is failing with a console-tab regression guard error. What happened?

My custom domain interdependentway.org stopped working after I pushed to gh-pages. GitHub Pages shows a 404.

Why did this break? The PCNA coherence lock is firing on every heartbeat tick since I updated the prompt context.
The deploy worked on staging but is failing on prod with a 500. It started after the last deploy.
I'm seeing unattributed cost in the Fleet — the total_cost_usd on the run is $0 even though I know the provider was called.
